div.head: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in Uruguay (Dawson)
div.p: 79. Please advise Uruguayan authorities that the press releases in regard to public notices of intention to negotiate with Uruguay and Argentina will be released for publication in papers appearing on the streets after 9 p.m. E. S. T. May 12.Released to the press on May 13; Department of State Bulletin, May 17, 1941, p. 581. The draft releases, which are routine in nature, refer to the public notices issued by the Secretary of State and by the Committee for Reciprocity Information in regard to briefs and public hearings and to the lists of products on which the United States will consider granting concessions.
Please acknowledge receipt of this telegram.
